knowledge_need: Study topic as Engineer-Philosopher. Attempt 1 of up to 3. Give compact Builder-relevant understanding, validation needs, and return plan.

part_digests.name: core meaning
part_digests.meaning: A minimal reusable builder learning rule is the smallest validated pattern that can be reused across future build decisions without becoming broad doctrine.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: It defines X as compression from experience into a bounded rule: condition, action, expected effect, and proof need.
compact_missing_knowledge: Exact local format for storing or naming such a rule
Threshold for reusable versus one-case note
compact_safe_learning_steps: Extract one candidate rule from an already validated case
Mark it draft until reuse is proven
part_digests.compact_validation_needed: Show the rule improves or preserves behavior on at least one separate case without breaking the original case
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: X should rebuild as a small rule schema, not a large philosophy or new subsystem.

part_digests.name: why I am not ideal
part_digests.meaning: The weakness exposed is tendency to confuse insight, memory, and authority: a plausible lesson can be over-promoted before behavior proves reuse.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: It explains why X must be minimal, validated, and demotable instead of treated as accepted truth.
compact_missing_knowledge: Which current Builder memories already suffer from over-broad learning
How demotion or expiration is represented locally
compact_safe_learning_steps: Separate observation, hypothesis, rule, and accepted atom
Require failure notes as well as success notes
part_digests.compact_validation_needed: Audit one candidate and confirm it does not claim more scope than its evidence supports
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: X should include anti-overreach language: reusable only under named conditions.

part_digests.name: builder relevance
part_digests.meaning: For self-build or child-agent build, the rule lets Builder retain useful construction behavior without copying whole episodes or inventing new architecture each time.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: It turns learning into a transferable build primitive: compact enough for retrieval, concrete enough for decision reuse.
compact_missing_knowledge: Where canonical decision reuse currently reads from
Which child-agent build decisions need reusable learning first
compact_safe_learning_steps: Prefer rules tied to repeated decision points
Avoid rules that directly alter runtime or route locks
part_digests.compact_validation_needed: Demonstrate retrieval of the rule changes a later decision in a traceable, bounded way
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: X should target behavior delta through reuse, not just better documentation.

part_digests.name: validation
part_digests.meaning: Understanding is validated when a draft rule can be applied to a new bounded case and produces a measurable decision or implementation improvement.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: It prevents X from becoming self-belief; proof must attach to reuse, not just formulation.
compact_missing_knowledge: Local validator or harness suitable for rule-reuse proof
Minimum acceptable evidence size for promotion
compact_safe_learning_steps: Use one old case and one nearby new case
Compare with and without the candidate rule
compact_validation_needed: A before-after decision trace showing correct use of the rule
A regression check that original behavior remains valid
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: X needs a validation clause before any retention or promotion decision.

part_digests.name: promotion decision
part_digests.meaning: A candidate should remain a case pattern until it proves reuse; it becomes an atom candidate only after bounded behavior delta, and an open gap if evidence or scope is missing.
part_digests.role_in_parent_task: It gives X a safe lifecycle: case pattern, atom candidate, accepted only after proof.
compact_missing_knowledge: Exact promotion gate used by current accepted atom retention
Whether failed candidates are quarantined, logged, or discarded
compact_safe_learning_steps: Classify each rule by evidence level
Promote only one step at a time
Keep rollback or demotion path explicit
part_digests.compact_validation_needed: Promotion record links rule, evidence, reuse case, and remaining limits
part_digests.return_to_parent_hint: X should return as a promotion-safe learning rule with no claim of acceptance.

dependencies: X2 depends on X1 because overreach is only visible after the rule boundary is defined
X3 depends on X1 because reuse must be defined before Builder relevance can be tested
X5 depends on X4 because promotion requires validation evidence
duplicates_or_overlaps: X4 overlaps X5: both discuss proof, but X4 defines evidence and X5 defines lifecycle decision
X1 overlaps X3: both describe reuse, but X1 is conceptual and X3 is operational

parent_return_plan.how_to_rebuild_x: Define X as a narrow learning lifecycle: extract one conditional case pattern, state its scope and failure boundary, test reuse on a separate case, then classify as case pattern, atom candidate, or open gap.
parent_return_plan.next_small_action: Draft one candidate minimal rule from an already validated Builder case and label its condition, action, expected effect, and proof need.
proof_needed: At least one separate reuse case showing behavior delta
Evidence that the rule did not broaden beyond its source case
Promotion decision tied to validation output

promotion_decision.owner_decision_required: only if promotion beyond case pattern is requested
promotion_decision.reason: Batch source answer is material only; default is compact case pattern with part map and parent return plan.
